channel.title: Module Verification Tasks on UnityChip Verification
channel.description: Recent content in Module Verification Tasks on UnityChip Verification

item.title: AI Operator Verification Phase 1: RISC-V Vector Computing Verification Practice (Completed)
UnityChip Hackathon Season 1: Warm-up Challenge (Completed)
item.description: Use UCAgent to participate in the hackathon and win prizes through practical combat

item.title: UT Practice Session 10: AI Vector Processor — Floating-Point Fused Add Module Verification (Completed)
item.description: Take on the RISC-V Vector Extension practice challenge and verify an AI chip module firsthand

item.title: UT Practice Session 9: Third-Generation XiangShan (Kunming Lake) Architecture LSU-StoreUnit Module UT Verification Practice (Completed)
item.description: Learn XiangShan LSU-StoreUnit microarchitecture design through verification

item.title: UT Practice Session 8: Third-Generation XiangShan (Kunming Lake) Architecture L2TLB-bitmap Module UT Verification Practice (Completed)
item.description: Learn the microarchitecture design of XiangShan’s L2TLB-bitmap through verification

item.title: UT Practical Session Phase 6: Third Generation Xiangshan (Kunming Lake) Architecture ICache Module UT Verification (Ongoing)
item.description: Learning Xiangshan ICache Microarchitecture Design Through Verification

item.title: UT Practice Session 7: UT Verification of the LSQ Module in the 3rd Generation XiangShan (Kunming Lake) Architecture (Completed)
item.description: Learn the microarchitecture design of XiangShan LSQ through verification

item.title: UT Practical Session Phase 5: Third Generation Xiangshan (Kunming Lake) Architecture IFU top Module UT Verification
item.description: Learning Xiangshan IFU Microarchitecture Design Through Verification

item.title: UT Practical Session Phase 4: Third Generation Xiangshan (Kunming Lake) Architecture FTQ Module UT Verification
item.description: Learning Xiangshan FTQ Microarchitecture Design Through Verification

item.title: UT Practical Session Phase 3: UT Verification Practice for the ITLB Module of the 3rd-Generation Xiangshan (Kunminghu) Architecture (Ongoing)
item.description: Learn the Microarchitecture Design of Xiangshan’s ITLB Through Verification

item.title: UT Practical Training Phase 2: Third Generation Xiangshan (Kunming Lake) Architecture IFU Module UT Verification Practice (In Progress)
item.description: Learning the microarchitecture design of Xiangshan IFU during verification.

item.title: Phase 1: Kunminghu BPU module UT verification practice(Finished)
item.description: Learning the microarchitecture design of the Xiangshan BPU through verification
